candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line; equals Total Revenue in the preview and is the most specific primary revenue label.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; identical to Sales in the preview and useful as fallback if label changes over time.
This is a cost line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line matching the target exactly.
Equivalent COGS/cost of revenues label; good fallback if naming changes.

variables.notes: Using COGS labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Valid overhead component and part of SG&A-type operating expenses.
Could be an overhead component, but appears less clearly populated in preview.
Not an expense row and therefore not suitable for SG&A mapping.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Best overhead components are Salaries and related expenses plus Other Operating Expenses. 'Salaries and related expenses' was selected from the full A-column because the candidate list clearly missed this key SG&A component. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Salaries and related expenses
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the Income Statement.

candidates.why: Broad financial expense bucket, but less specific than direct interest expense.
Broad finance cost line that includes more than interest.
Most specific reported interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest-related line, but only a lease-interest component rather than the main overall interest expense line.
Net finance costs can be used if direct interest expense is unavailable, but it includes income/other finance items.
Supplemental field but appears empty in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest field; less preferred than the main reported line.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the most specific interest-expense line first, then broader finance-cost fallbacks if labeling changes over time.

candidates.why: Income statement associate earnings, not book equity.
This is minority/non-controlling interest, not parent book equity.
Closest balance-sheet equity line, but there are two identical 'Total Equity' labels and one appears to differ by minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Only usable single-line equity label is 'Total Equity', but it appears twice in the preview with different values, likely one including and one excluding minority interest. Manual review is needed to confirm which occurrence should feed BE so that BE+MIB does not double count NCI.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not preferred for balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest label.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest label; most straightforward match.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet non-controlling-interest labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.
